summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Dubai Travel Assistant multi-agent system. All backend APIs functional, WhatsApp-themed frontend working perfectly, AI integration with Gemini 3 Flash successful, booking and escalation flows tested.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge overlay blocks send button clicks on mobile viewport

integration_issues.issue: Activity card images not loading properly in some cases (0/4 loaded in final test)

passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
WhatsApp-themed chat interface loading and styling
AI agent responses with structured JSON (text, activity_list, activity_info, booking, escalation)
Activity card display with pricing and variations
Booking flow - complete Desert Safari booking with confirmation
Escalation system - helicopter tour triggers proper escalation notice
Session persistence - conversation history maintained after page reload

action_item_for_main_agent.image_loading: Investigate activity card image loading issues - images may not be loading consistently
action_item_for_main_agent.mobile_overlay: Minor mobile UI overlay issue with badge blocking interactions on mobile viewport
